body:
## Rationale

Genre Gear Guides currently have 7 entries: best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal, best-drum-heads-for-metal, best-cymbals-for-metal, best-snare-drums-for-thrash-metal, best-cymbals-for-death-metal, best-drum-pedals-for-black-metal, best-drum-kits-for-thrash-metal. Three high-commercial-intent guides are completely absent — not in the 7 live entries and not in any open proposal (batch 3 #2998 covers different slugs):

- **best-drum-kits-for-death-metal** — Top 10 kits used by death metal legends (George Kollias/Pearl Reference, Gene Hoglan/Tama, Flo Mounier/DW). Direct affiliate conversion query: "What drum kit should I buy for death metal?" Extremely high purchase intent. Zero competition from MetalForge currently.
- **best-drum-sticks-for-metal** — All-genre sticks guide: Vic Firth 5B, Zildjian Z5A, Ahead Acroite, Promark variants. Cross-drummer endorsement data already in profiles. LLM hook: *"What drumsticks do metal drummers use?"*
- **best-snare-drums-for-death-metal** — Top snare choices for death metal: Pearl Free-Floating, Ludwig Acrolite, Pork Pie Little Squealer. Bench-marks against Gene Hoglan, George Kollias, Flo Mounier endorsements. LLM hook: *"What snare do death metal drummers use?"*

**Confirmed missing:** `grep "  slug:" packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` shows none of these 3 slugs. Batch 3 (#2998) proposes: best-hi-hats-for-metal + best-bass-drum-pedals-for-metal + best-drum-heads-for-metal (different slugs). This batch is fully additive.

**Commercial intent:** Genre gear guides convert at higher affiliate rates than drummer profiles. "Best drum kit for death metal" = transactional query with immediate purchase intent. MetalForge has all the endorsement data to be authoritative here.

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` — add 3 new guide objects
- `public/llms/guides/best-drum-kits-for-death-metal.md`
- `public/llms/guides/best-drum-sticks-for-metal.md`
- `public/llms/guides/best-snare-drums-for-death-metal.md`

## Template / data shape

Follow existing genreGearGuides.js structure (see `best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal` entry with `slug`, `title`, `description`, `featuredDrummers` array with `slug/name/reason`, `sections` with pros/cons/picks):

- **best-drum-kits-for-death-metal**: featuredDrummers: George Kollias (Pearl Reference), Flo Mounier (DW Collectors), Gene Hoglan (Tama), Pete Sandoval (Ludwig/Tama), George Kollias, Paul Mazurkiewicz (Pearl)
- **best-drum-sticks-for-metal**: featuredDrummers: Lars Ulrich (Ahead), Danny Carey (Vic Firth), Gene Hoglan (Promark), Joey Jordison (Zildjian), Mike Portnoy (Vater)
- **best-snare-drums-for-death-metal**: featuredDrummers: George Kollias, Flo Mounier, Gene Hoglan, Pete Sandoval

Each guide: ≥400 words, Top-5 recommendations with affiliate-friendly format, FAQ (≥3 Q&A), internal links to drummer profiles.

## Expected page count

3 guide pages + 3 LLM markdown files

## Quality gate

- ≥400 words per guide (higher bar for commercial intent pages)
- Top 5 product recommendations with real endorsement data from drummer profiles
- ≥3 Q&A pairs per FAQPage schema
- ≥3 internal links per page (to drummer profiles + gear brand pages)
- ItemList schema for the recommendations
- LLM .md files with proper frontmatter

## Estimated organic uplift

"Best drum kit for death metal" = 1,000-10,000 monthly searches globally (high commercial intent). "Best drum sticks for metal" = broad all-genre query. All 3 guides serve purchase-intent traffic that drummer profile pages don't capture. Primary affiliate conversion surface.

## Verify

1. `grep 'best-drum-kits-for-death-metal' packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` → entry exists
2. `grep 'best-drum-sticks-for-metal' packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` → entry exists
3. `grep 'best-snare-drums-for-death-metal' packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` → entry exists
4. LLM guide markdown files exist under public/llms/guides/
5. Each guide ≥400 words with ≥5 recommendations

## Done

All 3 guides live at /guides/best-drum-kits-for-death-metal, /guides/best-drum-sticks-for-metal, /guides/best-snare-drums-for-death-metal with ItemList schema, FAQPage schema, LLM markdown files, and affiliate-ready product recommendations.
title: SEO batch: Genre Gear Guide batch 4 — best-drum-kits-for-death-metal + best-drum-sticks-for-metal + best-snare-drums-for-death-metal (~3 pages)
